title: Lilim
wikitext:
[]: Lilim ....             Quote Post by Lujerker » Sat Dec 02, 2006 12:26 pm Well... it's a theory... but.. Lilim is the son of lilith (singular) ... but this separate. (= lilith/adam) and.... men, women and animals were born (plural) ???? why ? different forms to think.... as the same Lilith separates from de Adam..... could be ???? :oops:

[]:             Quote Post by MaggotMaster » Sat Dec 02, 2006 1:14 pm What.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sat Dec 02, 2006 1:19 pm the -im suffix is a Hebrew plural indicator (see also kerubim, seraphim, nephilim...)

[]:             Quote Post by Dascoo » Sat Dec 02, 2006 2:55 pm MaggotMaster wrote: What.
